CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Medicare Million Hearts Data File — Demographic File
Version — May 2025
SAS name Label Type Length
BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
PRACTICE_ID Model-Assigned Practice ID CHAR 9
PRACTICE_NAME Name of Practice CHAR 100
TIN Practice's Taxpayer Identification Number CHAR 9
UNIQUE_PATIENT_ID Unique Model-Assigned Patient ID CHAR 36
PATIENT_DOB Patient's Date of Birth DATE 8
PATIENT_SEX1 Patient's Sex CHAR 1
PATIENT_RACE Patient's
